description: Google provides a large set of developer products and cloud services. Within the surfaces verified here for google.com, the documented offerings include the Hotel Center Travel Partner API and the Developer Knowledge service for programmatic access to Google developer documentation.
summary: google.com exposes documented developer integration surfaces including the Travel Partner REST API, the Developer Knowledge REST API, the Developer Knowledge MCP server, and the gcloud CLI; these use Google Cloud API keys and/or Google OAuth access tokens depending on the surface.
